title: 「Even if」句型
titleEn: Using Even if to express an unchanged result under a possible condition

omissions: The PDF supplies the lesson title in Chinese only; titleEn is an editorial translation.

formula: Even if + condition clause, + main clause

formulas.labelZh: 基本公式：條件子句在前
formulas.formula: Even if + condition clause, + main clause

formulas.labelZh: 基本公式：條件子句在後
formulas.formula: Main clause + even if + condition clause
Even if + subject + present simple, subject + will / can / may / must / should + base verb.
Even if + subject + past simple, subject + would / could + base verb.

example: Even if it rains, the event will continue.
exampleZh: 即使下雨，活動仍會繼續。

examples.en: Even if it rains, the event will continue.
examples.zh: 即使下雨，活動仍會繼續。

meaning.en: Even if introduces a possible or imagined condition. The main action or result will remain the same if that condition happens.
meaning.zh: Even if 用來提出一個可能或假設的情況。即使該情況真的發生，主要行動或結果仍然不會改變。

benefits.en: It shows that a result will not change. This structure clearly tells the listener that a difficulty will not stop the main action.
benefits.zh: 這個句型能清楚表示，即使出現困難，主要行動或結果仍然不會改變。

benefits.en: It combines a possible problem and a response. You can connect the possible difficulty and the decision in one sentence instead of using two separate sentences.
benefits.zh: 把「可能出現的問題」和「仍會採取的行動」連成一句，不需要分開表達。

benefits.en: It makes plans, promises and advice clearer. You can use even if to show determination, give firm advice or explain what should happen in a difficult situation.
benefits.zh: 使計劃、承諾和建議更清楚；可以用 even if 表達決心、作出承諾，或說明面對困難時仍應怎樣做。

benefits.en: It helps you answer possible objections. In discussions and essays, you can mention a possible problem and show why your main point still stands.
benefits.zh: 幫助回應可能的反對意見；在討論和作文中，可以先承認一個可能出現的問題，再說明自己的主要觀點為何仍然成立。

benefits.en: It gives you another way to connect ideas and helps you avoid repeatedly using may…but… or perhaps…but….
benefits.zh: 提供另一種連接意思的方法，避免不斷重複使用 may…but… 或 perhaps…but…。

rules.en: The condition is uncertain or imagined. The situation after even if is usually uncertain or hypothetical.
rules.zh: 條件是不確定或假設的；even if 後面的情況通常尚未確定，或只是一個假設。

rules.en: The main result does not change. A difficulty or unfavourable situation will not change the main action or result.
rules.zh: 主要結果不會改變；即使出現困難、問題或不理想的情況，主要行動或結果仍然一樣。

rules.en: Do not normally use will after even if. When talking about the future, use the present simple after even if.
rules.zh: 談及未來時，even if 後面通常使用一般現在式，不使用 will。
examples: Correct: Even if it rains, we will go.
Incorrect: Even if it will rain, we will go.

rules.en: Use a comma when the even if clause comes first. A comma is not normally needed when the clause comes last.
rules.zh: 當 even if 子句放在句首時，後面要加逗號；放在句末時，通常不需要逗號。
examples: Even if the shop is busy, I will wait.
I will wait even if the shop is busy.

rules.en: Even if must normally be followed by a complete clause containing a subject and a verb.
rules.zh: even if 後面通常要接完整子句，即「主語＋動詞」。

rules.en: Even if describes a condition that may or may not happen. Even though describes a fact that is already true.
rules.zh: even if 表示某個情況可能發生，也可能不發生；even though 表示某個情況已經是真實的事實。
examples: Even if it rains, the event will continue.
Even though it is raining, the event is continuing.

sourceOmissions: The PDF supplies the lesson title in Chinese only; titleEn is an editorial translation.

en: Rewrite each sentence using even if to show that the main action or result will not change.
The first word of each answer has been provided.
zh: 使用 even if 改寫以下句子，表示即使某個情況發生，主要行動或結果仍然不會改變。
每題已提供答案的第一個字。

questions.prompt: It may rain, but the event will continue.
questions.promptZh: 可能會下雨，但活動仍會繼續。
questions.answer: Even if it rains, the event will continue.
questions.answerZh: 即使下雨，活動仍會繼續。
questions.highlight: Even if it rains, the event will continue.

questions.prompt: The bus could be late, but I will still arrive before the meeting starts.
questions.promptZh: 巴士可能會遲到，但我仍會在會議開始前到達。
questions.answer: I will still arrive before the meeting starts even if the bus is late.
questions.answerZh: 即使巴士遲到，我仍會在會議開始前到達。
questions.highlight: I will still arrive before the meeting starts even if the bus is late.

questions.prompt: Whether Tom feels tired or not, he will finish his homework tonight.
questions.promptZh: 不論湯姆是否感到疲倦，他今晚都會完成家課。
questions.answer: Tom will finish his homework tonight even if he feels tired.
questions.answerZh: 即使湯姆感到疲倦，他今晚仍會完成家課。
questions.highlight: Tom will finish his homework tonight even if he feels tired.

questions.prompt: What if the library is crowded? We will still study there.
questions.promptZh: 如果圖書館很擠迫怎麼辦？我們仍會在那裏溫習。
questions.answer: Even if the library is crowded, we will still study there.
questions.answerZh: 即使圖書館很擠迫，我們仍會在那裏溫習。
questions.highlight: Even if the library is crowded, we will still study there.

questions.prompt: If the lift stops working, that will not stop Ben from using the stairs.
questions.promptZh: 如果升降機停止運作，本仍會使用樓梯。
questions.answer: Ben will use the stairs even if the lift stops working.
questions.answerZh: 即使升降機停止運作，本仍會使用樓梯。
questions.highlight: Ben will use the stairs even if the lift stops working.

questions.prompt: Regardless of whether the weather is cold, the children will play outside.
questions.promptZh: 不論天氣是否寒冷，孩子們都會在戶外玩耍。
questions.answer: The children will play outside even if the weather is cold.
questions.answerZh: 即使天氣寒冷，孩子們仍會在戶外玩耍。
questions.highlight: The children will play outside even if the weather is cold.

questions.prompt: There is a chance that the meal will be expensive, but we will eat at that restaurant.
questions.promptZh: 那頓飯可能會很昂貴，但我們仍會在那間餐廳用餐。
questions.answer: Even if the meal is expensive, we will eat at that restaurant.
questions.answerZh: 即使那頓飯很昂貴，我們仍會在那間餐廳用餐。
questions.highlight: Even if the meal is expensive, we will eat at that restaurant.

questions.prompt: Making a mistake will not stop me from trying again.
questions.promptZh: 犯錯不會阻止我再次嘗試。
questions.answer: I will try again even if I make a mistake.
questions.answerZh: 即使我犯錯，我仍會再嘗試。
questions.highlight: I will try again even if I make a mistake.

questions.prompt: The film might be long, but Grace will watch it until the end.
questions.promptZh: 這部電影可能很長，但格蕾絲仍會看到最後。
questions.answer: Grace will watch the film until the end even if it is long.
questions.answerZh: 即使這部電影很長，格蕾絲仍會看到最後。
questions.highlight: Grace will watch the film until the end even if it is long.

questions.prompt: The shop may be busy. Mia will wait for her turn anyway.
questions.promptZh: 商店可能很繁忙。米婭無論如何都會等候輪到自己。
questions.answer: Mia will wait for her turn even if the shop is busy.
questions.answerZh: 即使商店很繁忙，米婭仍會等候輪到自己。
questions.highlight: Mia will wait for her turn even if the shop is busy.

questions.prompt: Whether you agree with me or not, please listen to my explanation.
questions.promptZh: 不論你是否同意我，請聽完我的解釋。
questions.answer: Please listen to my explanation even if you do not agree with me.
questions.answerZh: 即使你不同意我，也請聽完我的解釋。
questions.highlight: Please listen to my explanation even if you do not agree with me.

questions.prompt: There may not be enough chairs, but the meeting will start on time.
questions.promptZh: 椅子可能不夠，但會議仍會準時開始。
questions.answer: The meeting will start on time even if there are not enough chairs.
questions.answerZh: 即使椅子不夠，會議仍會準時開始。
questions.highlight: The meeting will start on time even if there are not enough chairs.

questions.prompt: Whether Daniel finds the map or not, he can ask a member of staff for help.
questions.promptZh: 不論丹尼爾能否找到地圖，他都可以向職員求助。
questions.answer: Daniel can ask a member of staff for help even if he cannot find the map.
questions.answerZh: 即使丹尼爾找不到地圖，他也可以向職員求助。
questions.highlight: Daniel can ask a member of staff for help even if he cannot find the map.

questions.prompt: The battery may be low, but the phone can still make an emergency call.
questions.promptZh: 電池電量可能很低，但這部電話仍可撥打緊急電話。
questions.answer: Even if the battery is low, the phone can still make an emergency call.
questions.answerZh: 即使電池電量很低，這部電話仍可撥打緊急電話。
questions.highlight: Even if the battery is low, the phone can still make an emergency call.

questions.prompt: No matter whether Sarah wins or loses, her family will be proud of her.
questions.promptZh: 不論莎拉勝出或落敗，她的家人都會為她感到驕傲。
questions.answer: Sarah's family will be proud of her even if she loses.
questions.answerZh: 即使莎拉落敗，她的家人仍會為她感到驕傲。
questions.highlight: Sarah's family will be proud of her even if she loses.

questions.prompt: Maybe the lesson will be difficult, but the students should not give up.
questions.promptZh: 這堂課可能很困難，但學生不應放棄。
questions.answer: The students should not give up even if the lesson is difficult.
questions.answerZh: 即使這堂課很困難，學生也不應放棄。
questions.highlight: The students should not give up even if the lesson is difficult.

questions.prompt: Regardless of whether the café is full, we can buy takeaway drinks.
questions.promptZh: 不論咖啡店是否滿座，我們都可以購買外賣飲品。
questions.answer: We can buy takeaway drinks even if the café is full.
questions.answerZh: 即使咖啡店滿座，我們也可以購買外賣飲品。
questions.highlight: We can buy takeaway drinks even if the café is full.

questions.prompt: It is possible that you will not understand every word, but keep reading.
questions.promptZh: 你可能不會明白每一個字，但請繼續閱讀。
questions.answer: Keep reading even if you do not understand every word.
questions.answerZh: 即使你不明白每一個字，也請繼續閱讀。
questions.highlight: Keep reading even if you do not understand every word.

questions.prompt: The road may be wet, but drivers must follow the speed limit.
questions.promptZh: 路面可能濕滑，但駕駛者必須遵守速度限制。
questions.answer: Drivers must follow the speed limit even if the road is wet.
questions.answerZh: 即使路面濕滑，駕駛者也必須遵守速度限制。
questions.highlight: Drivers must follow the speed limit even if the road is wet.

questions.prompt: What if Anna's friends laugh at her idea? She will still share it with the class.
questions.promptZh: 如果安娜的朋友取笑她的想法怎麼辦？她仍會與全班分享。
questions.answer: Anna will share her idea with the class even if her friends laugh at it.
questions.answerZh: 即使朋友取笑安娜的想法，她仍會與全班分享。
questions.highlight: Anna will share her idea with the class even if her friends laugh at it.

questions.prompt: If I had less free time, I would still exercise twice a week.
questions.promptZh: 如果我的空閒時間較少，我仍會每星期做兩次運動。
questions.answer: Even if I had less free time, I would still exercise twice a week.
questions.answerZh: 即使我的空閒時間較少，我仍會每星期做兩次運動。
questions.highlight: Even if I had less free time, I would still exercise twice a week.

questions.prompt: The room might be smaller than expected, but we could still hold the workshop there.
questions.promptZh: 房間可能比預期細小，但我們仍可在那裏舉行工作坊。
questions.answer: Even if the room were smaller than expected, we could still hold the workshop there.
questions.answerZh: 即使房間比預期細小，我們仍可在那裏舉行工作坊。
questions.highlight: Even if the room were smaller than expected, we could still hold the workshop there.

questions.prompt: The manager might reject the proposal. In that situation, the team would still learn from the process.
questions.promptZh: 經理可能會拒絕建議。即使如此，團隊仍可從過程中學習。
questions.answer: The team would still learn from the process even if the manager rejected the proposal.
questions.answerZh: 即使經理拒絕建議，團隊仍可從過程中學習。
questions.highlight: The team would still learn from the process even if the manager rejected the proposal.

questions.prompt: The price could rise, but Leo would still buy the laptop for work.
questions.promptZh: 價格可能上升，但里奧仍會購買手提電腦作工作用途。
questions.answer: Leo would still buy the laptop for work even if the price rose.
questions.answerZh: 即使價格上升，里奧仍會購買手提電腦作工作用途。
questions.highlight: Leo would still buy the laptop for work even if the price rose.

questions.prompt: The museum might not offer a guided tour, but visitors could still use the audio guide.
questions.promptZh: 博物館可能不提供導賞團，但訪客仍可使用語音導賞。
questions.answer: Visitors could still use the audio guide even if the museum did not offer a guided tour.
questions.answerZh: 即使博物館不提供導賞團，訪客仍可使用語音導賞。
questions.highlight: Visitors could still use the audio guide even if the museum did not offer a guided tour.

questions.prompt: The outdoor match might be cancelled because of a storm, but the players would continue training indoors.
questions.promptZh: 戶外比賽可能因暴風雨而取消，但球員仍會在室內繼續訓練。
questions.answer: The players would continue training indoors even if the outdoor match were cancelled because of a storm.
questions.answerZh: 即使戶外比賽因暴風雨而取消，球員仍會在室內繼續訓練。
questions.highlight: The players would continue training indoors even if the outdoor match were cancelled because of a storm.

questions.prompt: What would you do if nobody supported your plan? I would continue working on it.
questions.promptZh: 如果沒有人支持你的計劃，你會怎樣做？我仍會繼續努力實行。
questions.answer: I would continue working on my plan even if nobody supported it.
questions.answerZh: 即使沒有人支持我的計劃，我仍會繼續努力實行。
questions.highlight: I would continue working on my plan even if nobody supported it.

questions.prompt: The instructions might be unclear, but a careful reader could complete the task.
questions.promptZh: 指示可能不清楚，但細心的讀者仍可完成任務。
questions.answer: A careful reader could complete the task even if the instructions were unclear.
questions.answerZh: 即使指示不清楚，細心的讀者仍可完成任務。
questions.highlight: A careful reader could complete the task even if the instructions were unclear.

questions.prompt: Chloe said she would send the required documents before the deadline whether she received a reply or not.
questions.promptZh: 克洛伊說，不論是否收到回覆，她都會在限期前提交所需文件。
questions.answer: Chloe said she would send the required documents before the deadline even if she did not receive a reply.
questions.answerZh: 克洛伊說，即使沒有收到回覆，她仍會在限期前提交所需文件。
questions.highlight: Chloe said she would send the required documents before the deadline even if she did not receive a reply.

questions.prompt: The machine may stop unexpectedly, but trained staff can restart it safely.
questions.promptZh: 機器可能突然停止運作，但受過訓練的職員仍可安全地重新啟動它。
questions.answer: Trained staff can restart the machine safely even if it stops unexpectedly.
questions.answerZh: 即使機器突然停止運作，受過訓練的職員仍可安全地重新啟動它。
questions.highlight: Trained staff can restart the machine safely even if it stops unexpectedly.

questions.prompt: It is possible that the customer will be angry, but the staff should remain polite.
questions.promptZh: 顧客可能會生氣，但職員應保持禮貌。
questions.answer: The staff should remain polite even if the customer is angry.
questions.answerZh: 即使顧客生氣，職員也應保持禮貌。
questions.highlight: The staff should remain polite even if the customer is angry.

questions.prompt: Regardless of whether traffic is heavy, the ambulance must reach the hospital as quickly as possible.
questions.promptZh: 不論交通是否繁忙，救護車都必須盡快抵達醫院。
questions.answer: Even if traffic is heavy, the ambulance must reach the hospital as quickly as possible.
questions.answerZh: 即使交通繁忙，救護車也必須盡快抵達醫院。
questions.highlight: Even if traffic is heavy, the ambulance must reach the hospital as quickly as possible.

questions.prompt: The school may not receive extra funding, but it plans to keep the music programme.
questions.promptZh: 學校可能不會獲得額外撥款，但仍計劃保留音樂課程。
questions.answer: The school plans to keep the music programme even if it does not receive extra funding.
questions.answerZh: 即使學校沒有獲得額外撥款，仍計劃保留音樂課程。
questions.highlight: The school plans to keep the music programme even if it does not receive extra funding.

questions.prompt: If some residents disagree, the council can still hold a public meeting.
questions.promptZh: 如果部分居民不同意，區議會仍可舉行公眾會議。
questions.answer: The council can still hold a public meeting even if some residents disagree.
questions.answerZh: 即使部分居民不同意，區議會仍可舉行公眾會議。
questions.highlight: The council can still hold a public meeting even if some residents disagree.

questions.prompt: A few files might be missing, but the report can be completed with the available records.
questions.promptZh: 部分檔案可能遺失，但報告仍可利用現有紀錄完成。
questions.answer: The report can be completed with the available records even if a few files are missing.
questions.answerZh: 即使部分檔案遺失，報告仍可利用現有紀錄完成。
questions.highlight: The report can be completed with the available records even if a few files are missing.

questions.prompt: What if the internet connection becomes unstable during the presentation? Continue with the offline slides.
questions.promptZh: 如果簡報期間網絡連線變得不穩定怎麼辦？請繼續使用離線投影片。
questions.answer: Continue with the offline slides even if the internet connection becomes unstable during the presentation.
questions.answerZh: 即使簡報期間網絡連線變得不穩定，也請繼續使用離線投影片。
questions.highlight: Continue with the offline slides even if the internet connection becomes unstable during the presentation.

questions.prompt: The medicine may taste unpleasant, but the patient should take it as the doctor instructed.
questions.promptZh: 藥物味道可能不好，但病人應按醫生指示服用。
questions.answer: The patient should take the medicine as the doctor instructed even if it tastes unpleasant.
questions.answerZh: 即使藥物味道不好，病人也應按醫生指示服用。
questions.highlight: The patient should take the medicine as the doctor instructed even if it tastes unpleasant.

questions.prompt: No matter whether the volunteers have previous experience, they can receive training.
questions.promptZh: 不論義工是否有相關經驗，他們都可以接受培訓。
questions.answer: Even if the volunteers have no previous experience, they can receive training.
questions.answerZh: 即使義工沒有相關經驗，他們也可以接受培訓。
questions.highlight: Even if the volunteers have no previous experience, they can receive training.

questions.prompt: The package might arrive later than expected, but the customer will still receive a full refund.
questions.promptZh: 包裹可能比預期遲到，但顧客仍會獲得全額退款。
questions.answer: The customer will still receive a full refund even if the package arrives later than expected.
questions.answerZh: 即使包裹比預期遲到，顧客仍會獲得全額退款。
questions.highlight: The customer will still receive a full refund even if the package arrives later than expected.

questions.prompt: Failure of the first solution will not end the work. The engineers will test another one.
questions.promptZh: 第一個解決方案失敗也不會令工作停止。工程師會測試另一個方案。
questions.answer: Even if the first solution fails, the engineers will test another one.
questions.answerZh: 即使第一個解決方案失敗，工程師也會測試另一個方案。
questions.highlight: Even if the first solution fails, the engineers will test another one.

questions.prompt: The hospital may become extremely busy, but emergency patients will still be treated first.
questions.promptZh: 醫院可能變得非常繁忙，但急症病人仍會優先接受治療。
questions.answer: Emergency patients will still be treated first even if the hospital becomes extremely busy.
questions.answerZh: 即使醫院變得非常繁忙，急症病人仍會優先接受治療。
questions.highlight: Emergency patients will still be treated first even if the hospital becomes extremely busy.

questions.prompt: Whether a student can afford a private tutor or not, the school should provide enough learning support.
questions.promptZh: 不論學生能否負擔私人補習，學校都應提供足夠的學習支援。
questions.answer: The school should provide enough learning support even if a student cannot afford a private tutor.
questions.answerZh: 即使學生無法負擔私人補習，學校也應提供足夠的學習支援。
questions.highlight: The school should provide enough learning support even if a student cannot afford a private tutor.

questions.prompt: A worker might point out a serious problem during the meeting, but the manager should listen without becoming defensive.
questions.promptZh: 員工可能在會議上指出嚴重問題，但經理應聆聽，而不應採取防衛態度。
questions.answer: Even if a worker points out a serious problem during the meeting, the manager should listen without becoming defensive.
questions.answerZh: 即使員工在會議上指出嚴重問題，經理也應聆聽，而不應採取防衛態度。
questions.highlight: Even if a worker points out a serious problem during the meeting, the manager should listen without becoming defensive.

questions.prompt: It is possible that the new system will take longer to learn than expected, but the company will continue implementing it.
questions.promptZh: 新系統的學習時間可能比預期長，但公司仍會繼續推行。
questions.answer: The company will continue implementing the new system even if it takes longer to learn than expected.
questions.answerZh: 即使新系統的學習時間比預期長，公司仍會繼續推行。
questions.highlight: The company will continue implementing the new system even if it takes longer to learn than expected.

questions.prompt: The weather warning may remain in force, but the delivery team can continue working by using a safer route.
questions.promptZh: 天氣警告可能仍然生效，但送貨團隊可以改用較安全的路線繼續工作。
questions.answer: Even if the weather warning remains in force, the delivery team can continue working by using a safer route.
questions.answerZh: 即使天氣警告仍然生效，送貨團隊也可以改用較安全的路線繼續工作。
questions.highlight: Even if the weather warning remains in force, the delivery team can continue working by using a safer route.

questions.prompt: Residents may disagree about some details, but they can still work together on a shared safety plan.
questions.promptZh: 居民可能不同意部分細節，但仍可共同制定一個安全計劃。
questions.answer: Residents can still work together on a shared safety plan even if they disagree about some details.
questions.answerZh: 即使居民不同意部分細節，仍可共同制定一個安全計劃。
questions.highlight: Residents can still work together on a shared safety plan even if they disagree about some details.

questions.prompt: What if the evidence does not support our original idea? Researchers must report the results honestly.
questions.promptZh: 如果證據不支持我們原本的想法怎麼辦？研究人員必須如實報告結果。
questions.answer: Researchers must report the results honestly even if the evidence does not support their original idea.
questions.answerZh: 即使證據不支持研究人員原本的想法，他們也必須如實報告結果。
questions.highlight: Researchers must report the results honestly even if the evidence does not support their original idea.

questions.prompt: The public may criticise the decision, but officials should explain the reasons clearly and review its impact.
questions.promptZh: 公眾可能批評這項決定，但官員應清楚解釋原因，並檢討其影響。
questions.answer: Officials should explain the reasons clearly and review the impact of the decision even if the public criticises it.
questions.answerZh: 即使公眾批評這項決定，官員也應清楚解釋原因，並檢討這項決定的影響。
questions.highlight: Officials should explain the reasons clearly and review the impact of the decision even if the public criticises it.

questions.prompt: The train service could be suspended, but passengers would still be able to reach the airport by replacement bus.
questions.promptZh: 列車服務可能暫停，但乘客仍可乘坐替代巴士前往機場。
questions.answer: Passengers would still be able to reach the airport by replacement bus even if the train service were suspended.
questions.answerZh: 即使列車服務暫停，乘客仍可乘坐替代巴士前往機場。
questions.highlight: Passengers would still be able to reach the airport by replacement bus even if the train service were suspended.

questions.prompt: The first attempt might not solve the problem completely, but the team will keep improving the plan until it works.
questions.promptZh: 第一次嘗試可能無法完全解決問題，但團隊會繼續改進計劃，直至成功。
questions.answer: The team will keep improving the plan until it works even if the first attempt does not solve the problem completely.
questions.answerZh: 即使第一次嘗試無法完全解決問題，團隊仍會繼續改進計劃，直至成功。
questions.highlight: The team will keep improving the plan until it works even if the first attempt does not solve the problem completely.
